ground_truth:
TRANSTHORACIC ECHOCARDIOGRAM REPORT

Patient: Elizabeth Moore
DOB: 08/11/1972
Date of Study: 16/01/2024
Referring Physician: Dr. Williams

2D Echocardiography:
Left Ventricle:
  LVEDD: 4.8 cm (normal)
  LVESD: 3.1 cm (normal)
  IVSd: 1.1 cm (normal)
  LVPWd: 1.0 cm (normal)
  LVEF: 62% (Simpson biplane)

Left Atrium: 3.6 cm (upper limit of normal)

Right Ventricle: Normal size and function
Right Atrium: Normal size

Valves:
  Aortic Valve: Trileaflet, normal excursion. Peak velocity 1.2 m/s. No regurgitation.
  Mitral Valve: Normal leaflets. Mild posterior mitral annular calcification. Trace regurgitation.
  Tricuspid Valve: Normal. Trace regurgitation. TR velocity 2.4 m/s.
  Pulmonic Valve: Normal. No stenosis or regurgitation.

Doppler:
  E/A ratio: 1.1 (normal diastolic function)
  Deceleration time: 180 ms

Conclusions:
1. Normal left ventricular size and systolic function (LVEF 62%)
2. Normal diastolic function
3. Trace mitral and tricuspid regurgitation
4. No pericardial effusion

Dr. Karen Lee, FASE
Echocardiography Laboratory
